package rulefixtures

// scenario for xml_decoder_without_strict: `xml.NewDecoder(r)` without setting `Strict = false` when processing trusted XML
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule696NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario696Negative(records []Rule696NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
